positive_observations.evidence: Matter/Vault denied/review screens show explicit guard copy, no horizontal overflow, and P4-T04 confirms enabled guarded mutation controls=0 for Matter/Vault action strips.
HRX audit step-up retry remains guarded with step-up copy/API proof from P4-T03/P4-T08; no PASS claim is inferred.
P1-T11 found 68 disabled/unavailable-hint controls and 47 unavailable states across 53 routes; these are inventory evidence, not operational PASS claims.

findings.title: Client denied/review guarded panels still expose enabled mutation affordance
findings.evidence: P3-T10 metrics for client-denied and client-review show guardText visible but enabledMutationButtonCount=1. The API still denies where required, but the affordance does not visually communicate unavailability as cleanly as Matter/Vault guarded strips.

post_closeout_resolution.note: Historical P7/P8 artifacts remain closeout snapshots; current product hides Client guarded-state mutation affordances and skips guarded record-action fetches. Copy-policy cleanup remains open under P7-COPY-002.

findings.title: People directory denied/review guarded state remains a known gap
findings.evidence: P3-T10 and P4-T01 preserve the People directory denied/review gap as FAIL because the guarded state is not shown and protected People tokens can appear in the gap contexts.

post_closeout_resolution_client_guarded_.note: Historical P7/P8 artifacts remain closeout snapshots; current product hides Client guarded-state mutation affordances and skips guarded record-action fetches. Copy-policy cleanup remains open under P7-COPY-002.
